pi = np.pi

# Angular frequencies in GHz
wr = 2 * pi * 5.19 # cavity
w1_0 = 2 * pi * 6.469
w2_0 = 2 * pi * 6.546
ws = 2 * pi * 6.675 # stark tone

g1 = 2 * pi * 0.105
g2 = 2 * pi * 0.105

sx = qt.sigmax()
sy = qt.sigmay()
sz = qt.sigmaz()
sp = qt.sigmap()
sm = qt.sigmam()
I2 = qt.qeye(2)

sx1 = qt.tensor(sx, I2)
sx2 = qt.tensor(I2, sx)
sy1 = qt.tensor(sy, I2)
sy2 = qt.tensor(I2, sy)
sz1 = qt.tensor(sz, I2)
sz2 = qt.tensor(I2, sz)
sp1 = qt.tensor(sp, I2)
sm1 = qt.tensor(sm, I2)
sp2 = qt.tensor(I2, sp)
sm2 = qt.tensor(I2, sm)

exchange_op = sm1 * sp2 + sp1 * sm2
# spec_op = qt.tensor(sx, I2) - qt.tensor(I2, sx)
def spectroscopy_operator(w1p, w2p):
    Delta1p = w1p - wr
    Delta2p = w2p - wr
    return (g1 / Delta1p) * qt.tensor(sx, I2) - (g2 / Delta2p) * qt.tensor(I2, sx)

gg = qt.tensor(qt.basis(2, 0), qt.basis(2, 0))

def stark_shifted_qubit_freqs(
    pwr,
    eta1=2 * pi * 0.20,
    eta2=2 * pi * 0.20
):
    Delta_rS = wr - ws
    Delta_a1S = w1_0 - ws
    Delta_a2S = w2_0 - ws

    Omega1 = eta1 * np.sqrt(max(pwr, 0.0))
    Omega2 = eta2 * np.sqrt(max(pwr, 0.0))

    d_omega1_stark = Omega1**2 / (2 * Delta_a1S)
    d_omega2_stark = Omega2**2 / (2 * Delta_a2S)

    chi1 = g1**2 / (w1_0 - wr)
    chi2 = g2**2 / (w2_0 - wr)

    w1p = w1_0 + chi1 + d_omega1_stark
    w2p = w2_0 + chi2 + d_omega2_stark
    return w1p, w2p

def effective_exchange_coupling(w1p, w2p):
    Delta1p = w1p - wr
    Delta2p = w2p - wr
    J = -0.5 * g1 * g2 * (1.0 / Delta1p + 1.0 / Delta2p)
    return J

def effective_hamiltonian(pwr, eta1=2 * pi * 0.20, eta2=2 * pi * 0.20):
    w1p, w2p = stark_shifted_qubit_freqs(pwr, eta1=eta1, eta2=eta2)
    J = effective_exchange_coupling(w1p, w2p)

    H = 0.5 * w1p * sz1 + 0.5 * w2p * sz2 + J * exchange_op
    return H, w1p, w2p, J

def dressed_transition_data(pwr, eta1=2 * pi * 0.20, eta2=2 * pi * 0.20):
    H, w1p, w2p, J = effective_hamiltonian(
        pwr, eta1=eta1, eta2=eta2
    )

    evals, evecs = H.eigenstates()
    evals = np.array([np.real(ev) for ev in evals])

    ground_index = int(np.argmin(evals))
    Eg = evals[ground_index]
    gstate = evecs[ground_index]

    transition_freqs = []
    bright_weights = []

    for k, (Ek, psi_k) in enumerate(zip(evals, evecs)):
        if k == ground_index:
            continue
        wk = Ek - Eg
        Dop = spectroscopy_operator(w1p, w2p)
        amp = psi_k.dag() * Dop * gstate
        # amp = psi_k.dag() * spec_op * gstate
        mk = abs(amp) ** 2
        transition_freqs.append(np.real(wk))
        bright_weights.append(np.real(mk))

    transition_freqs = np.array(transition_freqs)
    bright_weights = np.array(bright_weights)

    order = np.argsort(transition_freqs)
    transition_freqs = transition_freqs[order]
    bright_weights = bright_weights[order]

    return transition_freqs, bright_weights, w1p, w2p, J

def lorentzian(omega, omega0, gamma):
  return gamma**2 / ((omega-omega0)**2 + gamma**2)

def solve_point(i, j, pwr, wprobe, gamma, eta1, eta2):
    transition_freqs, bright_weights, _, _, _ = dressed_transition_data(
        pwr,
        eta1=eta1,
        eta2=eta2,
    )

    intensity = 0.0
    for omega0, amp in zip(transition_freqs, bright_weights):
        intensity += amp * lorentzian(wprobe, omega0, gamma)

    return i, j, intensity


power = np.linspace(0.0, 1.7, 400)
probe_freqs_vals = np.linspace(6.35, 6.56, 400)
probe_freqs = 2 * np.pi * probe_freqs_vals

# Starting width
gamma = 2 * np.pi * 0.004
eta1 = 2 * np.pi * 0.109
eta2 = 2 * np.pi * 0.169

# build jobs for parallelization
tasks = [
    (i, j, pwr, wprobe)
    for i, pwr in enumerate(power)
    for j, wprobe in enumerate(probe_freqs)
]

results = Parallel(n_jobs=-1)(
    delayed(solve_point)(i, j, pwr, wprobe, gamma, eta1, eta2)
    for i, j, pwr, wprobe in tasks
)

# Build the intensity grid
intensity_grid = np.zeros((len(power), len(probe_freqs_vals)), dtype=float)
for i, j, intensity in results:
  intensity_grid[i,j] = intensity

if intensity_grid.max() > 0:
  intensity_grid /= intensity_grid.max()

# Functions for the branches
lower_branch = np.zeros_like(power)
upper_branch = np.zeros_like(power)
lower_weight = np.zeros_like(power)
upper_weight = np.zeros_like(power)

for i, pwr in enumerate(power):
    transition_freqs, bright_weights, w1p, w2p, J = dressed_transition_data(
        pwr,
        eta1=eta1,
        eta2=eta2,
    )

    lower_branch[i] = transition_freqs[0] / (2*pi)
    upper_branch[i] = transition_freqs[1] / (2*pi)
    lower_weight[i] = bright_weights[0]
    upper_weight[i] = bright_weights[1]

    row = np.zeros(len(probe_freqs), dtype=float)
    for omega0, amp in zip(transition_freqs, bright_weights):
      row += amp * lorentzian(probe_freqs, omega0, gamma)
    intensity_grid[i, :] = row


from matplotlib.colors import LinearSegmentedColormap

def pwr_to_photons(p):
  return p/ 0.77

def photons_to_pwr(n):
  return 0.77 * n


fig4a_blue_cmap = LinearSegmentedColormap.from_list(
    "fig4a_blue",
    [
        "#081d58",
        "#0b2c7a",
        "#1d4f91",
        "#2f7fb8",
        "#6baed6",
        "#bdd7e7",
        "#f7fbff",
    ],
)
In [ ]:
from matplotlib.ticker import MultipleLocator, FormatStrFormatter

plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
plot_grid = intensity_grid
plt.imshow(
    plot_grid**0.6,
    aspect="auto",
    origin="lower",
    cmap=fig4a_blue_cmap,
    extent=[probe_freqs_vals[0], probe_freqs_vals[-1], power[0], power[-1]]
)

ax = plt.gca()
secax = ax.secondary_yaxis('right', functions=(pwr_to_photons, photons_to_pwr))
secax.yaxis.set_major_locator(MultipleLocator(1))
secax.yaxis.set_major_formatter(FormatStrFormatter("%d"))

secax.set_ylabel('Number of photons')
plt.plot(lower_branch, power, "w--", linewidth=1.0)
plt.plot(upper_branch, power, "w--", linewidth=1.0)
plt.xlabel("Probe frequency (GHz)")
plt.xlim(6.35, 6.56)
plt.ylabel("Stark power (arb.)")
plt.title("Spectroscopy of qubit")
# plt.colorbar(label="Normalized intensity")
plt.xticks(np.arange(6.350, 6.6, 0.05))
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig("fig4a_branches.pdf", dpi=300)
plt.show()
In [ ]:
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import qutip as qt

pi = np.pi

# Initializing the parameters discussed in the paper
WR_MHZ = 5190.0 # Cavity resonance
WD_STARK_MHZ = 6675.0 # Stark tone freq
KAPPA_MHZ = 33.0 # cavity decay rate

W1_BASE_MHZ = 6469.0 # qubit 1 freq
W2_BASE_MHZ = 6546.0 # qubit 2 freq

G1_MHZ = 105.0
G2_MHZ = 105.0

J_MHZ = 13.0
POWER_PER_PHOTON_MW = 0.77 # from caption


TOTAL_MEAS_DELAY_NS = 130.0 # obtained from Figure 4b.

# relaxation times
T1_Q1_NS = 78.0
T1_2_Q1_NS = 120
T1_Q2_NS = 120.0
T2_2_Q2_NS = 160

# decoherence times
TPHI_Q1_NS = (1/T1_2_Q1_NS - 1/(2*T1_Q1_NS))**-1
TPHI_Q2_NS = (1/T2_2_Q2_NS - 1/(2*T1_Q2_NS))**-1

# Estimate from looking at Figure 4c initial conditions
FIG4C_REF_Q1_MV = 0.570
FIG4C_REF_Q2_MV = 0.810

FIG4C_MID_MV = 0.5 * (FIG4C_REF_Q1_MV + FIG4C_REF_Q2_MV)
FIG4C_CONTRAST_MV = 0.5 * (FIG4C_REF_Q2_MV - FIG4C_REF_Q1_MV)

# Adding noise/dissipation to model
# These values will be tweaked
FIG4C_BACKGROUND_LEAK_SCALE = 0.025
FIG4C_BACKGROUND_LEAK_RATIO = 0.05 # How much of the ground state leakage is inherited by qubit 2 relative to qubit 1
FIG4C_BACKGROUND_GAIN = 0.115
FIG4C_STARK_TPHI_SCALE = 1.0 # Changes dephasing in exchange window


G = qt.basis(2, 0) # ground state
E = qt.basis(2, 1) # excited state
GG = qt.tensor(G, G) # \ket{00}

I2 = qt.qeye(2)

SX1 = qt.tensor(qt.sigmax(), I2)
SX2 = qt.tensor(I2, qt.sigmax())

SZ1 = qt.tensor(qt.sigmaz(), I2)
SZ2 = qt.tensor(I2, qt.sigmaz())

SP1 = qt.tensor(qt.sigmap(), I2)
SM1 = qt.tensor(qt.sigmam(), I2)

SP2 = qt.tensor(I2, qt.sigmap())
SM2 = qt.tensor(I2, qt.sigmam())

EXCHANGE = SP1 * SM2 + SM1 * SP2

PE1 = qt.tensor(E * E.dag(), I2)
PE2 = qt.tensor(I2, E * E.dag())

# Pi-pulse
U_PI_1 = (-0.5j * pi * SX1).expm()
U_PI_2 = (-0.5j * pi * SX2).expm()

# Find the resonant Stark Power
resonance_powers_mw = np.linspace(0.2, 1.7, 1201)
splitting_scan_mhz = np.zeros_like(resonance_powers_mw)

for idx, power_mw in enumerate(resonance_powers_mw):
    nbar = power_mw / POWER_PER_PHOTON_MW

    omega1_mhz = 2.0 * G1_MHZ * np.sqrt(nbar)
    omega2_mhz = 2.0 * G2_MHZ * np.sqrt(nbar)

    delta1_mhz = W1_BASE_MHZ - WD_STARK_MHZ
    delta2_mhz = W2_BASE_MHZ - WD_STARK_MHZ

    shift1_mhz = omega1_mhz**2 / (2.0 * delta1_mhz)
    shift2_mhz = omega2_mhz**2 / (2.0 * delta2_mhz)

    w1_mhz = W1_BASE_MHZ + shift1_mhz
    w2_mhz = W2_BASE_MHZ + shift2_mhz

    h_lab_mhz = (
        0.5 * w1_mhz * SZ1
        + 0.5 * w2_mhz * SZ2
        + J_MHZ * EXCHANGE
    )

    energies = np.sort(h_lab_mhz.eigenenergies())
    splitting_scan_mhz[idx] = energies[2] - energies[1]

resonant_power_mw = float(resonance_powers_mw[np.argmin(splitting_scan_mhz)])

print("Resonant Stark power =", resonant_power_mw, "mW")
print("Minimum splitting =", splitting_scan_mhz.min(), "MHz")

times_ns = np.linspace(0.0, 100.0, 101)
power_mw = resonant_power_mw

nbar = power_mw / POWER_PER_PHOTON_MW

omega1_mhz = 2.0 * G1_MHZ * np.sqrt(nbar)
omega2_mhz = 2.0 * G2_MHZ * np.sqrt(nbar)

delta1_mhz = W1_BASE_MHZ - WD_STARK_MHZ
delta2_mhz = W2_BASE_MHZ - WD_STARK_MHZ

shift1_mhz = omega1_mhz**2 / (2.0 * delta1_mhz)
shift2_mhz = omega2_mhz**2 / (2.0 * delta2_mhz)

w1_mhz = W1_BASE_MHZ + shift1_mhz
w2_mhz = W2_BASE_MHZ + shift2_mhz

standard_c_ops = [
    np.sqrt(1.0 / T1_Q1_NS) * SM1,
    np.sqrt(1.0 / T1_Q2_NS) * SM2,
    np.sqrt(1.0 / (2.0 * TPHI_Q1_NS)) * SZ1,
    np.sqrt(1.0 / (2.0 * TPHI_Q2_NS)) * SZ2,
]

exchange_c_ops = [
    np.sqrt(1.0 / T1_Q1_NS) * SM1,
    np.sqrt(1.0 / T1_Q2_NS) * SM2,
    np.sqrt(1.0 / (2.0 * FIG4C_STARK_TPHI_SCALE * TPHI_Q1_NS)) * SZ1,
    np.sqrt(1.0 / (2.0 * FIG4C_STARK_TPHI_SCALE * TPHI_Q2_NS)) * SZ2,
]

p1_ref = float(np.exp(-TOTAL_MEAS_DELAY_NS / T1_Q1_NS))
p2_ref = float(np.exp(-TOTAL_MEAS_DELAY_NS / T1_Q2_NS))

omega1_bg_mhz = FIG4C_BACKGROUND_LEAK_SCALE * 2.0 * G1_MHZ * np.sqrt(nbar)
omega2_bg_mhz = FIG4C_BACKGROUND_LEAK_RATIO * omega1_bg_mhz

h_background = 2.0 * pi * 1.0e-3 * (
    0.5 * (w1_mhz - WD_STARK_MHZ) * SZ1
    + 0.5 * (w2_mhz - WD_STARK_MHZ) * SZ2
    + 0.5 * omega1_bg_mhz * SX1
    + 0.5 * omega2_bg_mhz * SX2
)

background_result = qt.mesolve(
    h_background,
    GG,
    times_ns,
    standard_c_ops,
    e_ops=[PE1, PE2],
)

p1_bg = np.real(np.asarray(background_result.expect[0]))
p2_bg = np.real(np.asarray(background_result.expect[1]))

tail_ns = np.maximum((TOTAL_MEAS_DELAY_NS - times_ns), 0.0)

p1_bg *= np.exp(-tail_ns / T1_Q1_NS)
p2_bg *= np.exp(-tail_ns / T1_Q2_NS)

black = FIG4C_BACKGROUND_GAIN * (
    FIG4C_REF_Q1_MV * p1_bg / p1_ref
    + FIG4C_REF_Q2_MV * p2_bg / p2_ref
)

delta_mhz = float(w1_mhz - w2_mhz)

h_exchange = 2.0 * pi * 1.0e-3 * (
    0.25 * delta_mhz * (SZ1 - SZ2)
    + J_MHZ * EXCHANGE
)

green_initial = U_PI_1 * GG
red_initial = U_PI_2 * GG

green_result = qt.mesolve(
    h_exchange,
    green_initial,
    times_ns,
    exchange_c_ops,
    e_ops=[PE1, PE2],
)

red_result = qt.mesolve(
    h_exchange,
    red_initial,
    times_ns,
    exchange_c_ops,
    e_ops=[PE1, PE2],
)

green_p1 = np.real(np.asarray(green_result.expect[0]))
green_p2 = np.real(np.asarray(green_result.expect[1]))

red_p1 = np.real(np.asarray(red_result.expect[0]))
red_p2 = np.real(np.asarray(red_result.expect[1]))

green_p1 *= np.exp(-tail_ns / T1_Q1_NS)
green_p2 *= np.exp(-tail_ns / T1_Q2_NS)

red_p1 *= np.exp(-tail_ns / T1_Q1_NS)
red_p2 *= np.exp(-tail_ns / T1_Q2_NS)

green_total = np.clip(green_p1 + green_p2, 0.0, None)
red_total = np.clip(red_p1 + red_p2, 0.0, None)

green_initial_total = max(float(green_total[0]), 1.0e-12)
red_initial_total = max(float(red_total[0]), 1.0e-12)

green_visibility = np.clip(green_total / green_initial_total, 0.0, 1.0)
red_visibility = np.clip(red_total / red_initial_total, 0.0, 1.0)

green_polarization = (green_p1 - green_p2) / np.maximum(green_total, 1.0e-12)
red_polarization = (red_p1 - red_p2) / np.maximum(red_total, 1.0e-12)

green_swap_voltage = (
    FIG4C_MID_MV
    - FIG4C_CONTRAST_MV * green_visibility * green_polarization
)

red_swap_voltage = (
    FIG4C_MID_MV
    - FIG4C_CONTRAST_MV * red_visibility * red_polarization
)

green = black + green_swap_voltage
red = black + red_swap_voltage

green_open = black + FIG4C_REF_Q1_MV
red_open = black + FIG4C_REF_Q2_MV

ref_none = np.zeros_like(times_ns)
ref_green = np.full_like(times_ns, FIG4C_REF_Q1_MV, dtype=float)
ref_red = np.full_like(times_ns, FIG4C_REF_Q2_MV, dtype=float)

Resonant Stark power = 0.9275 mW
Minimum splitting = 26.00003062695955 MHz
In [ ]:
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
plt.rcdefaults()
plt.rcParams.update({'font.size': 14})
ax = plt.gca()

ax.plot(
    times_ns,
    ref_none,
    color="#202020",
    linewidth=1.1,
    label=r"$|{\downarrow \downarrow} \rangle$",
)

ax.plot(
    times_ns,
    ref_green,
    color="#0D9F4E",
    linewidth=1.15,
    label=r"$|{\uparrow \downarrow}\rangle$",
)

ax.plot(
    times_ns,
    ref_red,
    color="#E43C38",
    linewidth=1.15,
    label=r"$|{\downarrow \uparrow}\rangle$",
)

ax.plot(
    times_ns,
    green_open,
    linestyle="none",
    marker="o",
    markersize=4.3,
    markerfacecolor="none",
    markeredgecolor="#15B45C",
    markeredgewidth=1.0,
)

ax.plot(
    times_ns,
    red_open,
    linestyle="none",
    marker="o",
    markersize=4.3,
    markerfacecolor="none",
    markeredgecolor="#FF4A4A",
    markeredgewidth=1.0,
)

ax.plot(
    times_ns,
    black,
    linestyle="none",
    marker="o",
    markersize=3.8,
    color="#2B2727",
)

ax.plot(
    times_ns,
    green,
    linestyle="none",
    marker="o",
    markersize=4.6,
    color="#08A34B",
)

ax.plot(
    times_ns,
    red,
    linestyle="none",
    marker="o",
    markersize=4.6,
    color="#F23636",
)

ax.set_xlim(0.0, 100.0)
ax.set_ylim(-0.02, 1.2)

ax.set_xlabel(r"Stark pulse length, $\Delta t$ (ns)")
ax.set_ylabel("Homodyne voltage (mV)")
ax.set_title("Time-domain exchange oscillations")

ax.legend(loc="lower right")

plt.tight_layout()
# plt.savefig("fig4c_traces.pdf", bbox_inches="tight", dpi=300)
plt.show()
In [ ]:
power_line_mw = np.linspace(0.2, 1.7, 350)
split_line_mhz = np.zeros_like(power_line_mw)

# Using the expected number of photons
for idx, power_mw in enumerate(power_line_mw):
    nbar = power_mw / POWER_PER_PHOTON_MW

    omega1_mhz = 2.0 * G1_MHZ * np.sqrt(nbar)
    omega2_mhz = 2.0 * G2_MHZ * np.sqrt(nbar)

    delta1_mhz = W1_BASE_MHZ - WD_STARK_MHZ
    delta2_mhz = W2_BASE_MHZ - WD_STARK_MHZ

    # Rabi Frequency
    shift1_mhz = omega1_mhz**2 / (2.0 * delta1_mhz)
    shift2_mhz = omega2_mhz**2 / (2.0 * delta2_mhz)

    # shift frequency
    w1_mhz = W1_BASE_MHZ + shift1_mhz
    w2_mhz = W2_BASE_MHZ + shift2_mhz

    # effective hamiltonian
    h_lab_mhz = (
        0.5 * w1_mhz * SZ1
        + 0.5 * w2_mhz * SZ2
        + J_MHZ * EXCHANGE
    )

    # extract eigenvalues
    energies = np.sort(h_lab_mhz.eigenenergies())
    split_line_mhz[idx] = energies[2] - energies[1]

# Picking random power_values
sample_powers_mw = np.array(
    [
        0.45,
        0.53,
        0.61,
        0.69,
        0.78,
        0.88,
        0.98,
        1.09,
        1.20,
        1.32,
        1.44,
        1.57,
        1.70,
    ]
)

oscillation_mhz = np.zeros_like(sample_powers_mw)

fine_times_ns = np.linspace(0.0, 100.0, 4001)

standard_c_ops = [
    np.sqrt(1.0 / T1_Q1_NS) * SM1,
    np.sqrt(1.0 / T1_Q2_NS) * SM2,
    np.sqrt(1.0 / (2.0 * TPHI_Q1_NS)) * SZ1,
    np.sqrt(1.0 / (2.0 * TPHI_Q2_NS)) * SZ2,
]

for idx, power_mw in enumerate(sample_powers_mw):
    nbar = power_mw / POWER_PER_PHOTON_MW

    omega1_mhz = 2.0 * G1_MHZ * np.sqrt(nbar)
    omega2_mhz = 2.0 * G2_MHZ * np.sqrt(nbar)

    # detuning frequency
    delta1_mhz = W1_BASE_MHZ - WD_STARK_MHZ
    delta2_mhz = W2_BASE_MHZ - WD_STARK_MHZ

    shift1_mhz = omega1_mhz**2 / (2.0 * delta1_mhz)
    shift2_mhz = omega2_mhz**2 / (2.0 * delta2_mhz)

    w1_mhz = W1_BASE_MHZ + shift1_mhz
    w2_mhz = W2_BASE_MHZ + shift2_mhz

    delta_mhz = float(w1_mhz - w2_mhz)

    h_exchange = 2.0 * pi * 1.0e-3 * (
        0.25 * delta_mhz * (SZ1 - SZ2)
        + J_MHZ * EXCHANGE
    )

    # Master-equation solver with excited state (post pi-pulse)
    result = qt.mesolve(
        h_exchange,
        U_PI_1 * GG,
        fine_times_ns,
        standard_c_ops,
        e_ops=[PE1, PE2],
    )


    p2 = np.real(np.asarray(result.expect[1]))

    maxima = np.where(
        (p2[1:-1] > p2[:-2])
        & (p2[1:-1] >= p2[2:])
    )[0] + 1

    maxima = maxima[fine_times_ns[maxima] > 1.0]

    if maxima.size >= 2:
        periods_ns = np.diff(fine_times_ns[maxima])
        oscillation_mhz[idx] = 1.0e3 / periods_ns.mean()

    elif maxima.size == 1:
        oscillation_mhz[idx] = 5.0e2 / fine_times_ns[maxima[0]]

    else:
        signal = p2 - p2.mean()
        window = np.hanning(signal.size)

        spectrum = np.abs(np.fft.rfft(signal * window))

        freqs_mhz = np.fft.rfftfreq(
            signal.size,
            d=(fine_times_ns[1] - fine_times_ns[0]) * 1.0e-9,
        ) / 1.0e6

        band = (freqs_mhz >= 10.0) & (freqs_mhz <= 80.0)
        oscillation_mhz[idx] = freqs_mhz[band][np.argmax(spectrum[band])]
In [ ]:
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 5))
plt.rcParams.update({'font.size': 14})
ax = plt.gca()

ax.plot(
    power_line_mw,
    split_line_mhz,
    color="#3644A3",
    linewidth=2.2,
    label="Frequency splitting",
)

ax.plot(
    sample_powers_mw,
    oscillation_mhz,
    linestyle="none",
    marker="o",
    markersize=5.5,
    color="#F03A2C",
    label="Oscillation frequency",
)

ax.set_xlim(0.2, 1.7)

ax.set_xlabel("Stark power (mW)")
ax.set_ylabel("Frequency (MHz)")
ax.set_ylim(25, 55)
ax.legend(loc="best")

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig("fig4d_splitting_vs_oscillation.pdf", bbox_inches="tight")
plt.show()
